```
# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)
- Custom controllers for each entity
- Form types for data handling
- Custom security system (no FOSUserBundle)
- RESTful API endpoints (optional for AJAX)
- Service layer for business logic

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

### 4. **Template Structure**

    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/css/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.css">
    
    {% block stylesheets %}{% endblock %}
</head>
<body class="hold-transition sidebar-mini layout-fixed">
    <div class="wrapper">
        
        {# Navbar #}
        <nav class="main-header navbar navbar-expand navbar-white navbar-light">

{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

### 4. **Template Structure**

{# filepath: templates/admin/layout.html.twig #}

    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/css/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.css">
    
    {% block stylesheets %}{% endblock %}

    <div class="wrapper">
        
        {# Navbar #}

```
# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)
- Custom controllers for each entity
- Form types for data handling
- Custom security system (no FOSUserBundle)
- RESTful API endpoints (optional for AJAX)
- Service layer for business logic

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}

```
# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)
- Custom controllers for each entity
- Form types for data handling
- Custom security system (no FOSUserBundle)
- RESTful API endpoints (optional for AJAX)
- Service layer for business logic

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

### 4. **Template Structure**

````twig
{# filepath: templates/admin/layout.html.twig #}

    <title>{% block title %}Admin Dashboard{% endblock %}</title>
    
    {# AdminLTE 3 CSS #}
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/admin-lte@3.2/dist/css/adminlte.min.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/css/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.css">
    
    {% block stylesheets %}{% endblock %}
</head>
<body class="hold-transition sidebar-mini layout-fixed">
    <div class="wrapper">
        
        {# Navbar #}
        <nav class="main-header navbar navbar-expand navbar-white navbar-light">
            <ul class="navbar-nav">
                <li class="nav-item">
                    <a class="nav-link" data-widget="pushmenu" href="#" role="button">
                        <i class="fas fa-bars"></i>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>

                <li class="nav-item">

                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>

            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

```
# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)
- Custom controllers for each entity
- Form types for data handling
- Custom security system (no FOSUserBundle)
- RESTful API endpoints (optional for AJAX)
- Service layer for business logic

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

```
# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)
- Custom controllers for each entity
- Form types for data handling
- Custom security system (no FOSUserBundle)
- RESTful API endpoints (optional for AJAX)
- Service layer for business logic

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

### 4. **Template Structure**

````twig
{# filepath: templates/admin/layout.html.twig #}
<!DOCTYPE html>

    {# AdminLTE 3 CSS #}
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/admin-lte@3.2/dist/css/adminlte.min.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/css/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.css">
    
    {% block stylesheets %}{% endblock %}
</head>
<body class="hold-transition sidebar-mini layout-fixed">
    <div class="wrapper">
        
        {# Navbar #}
        <nav class="main-header navbar navbar-expand navbar-white navbar-light">
            <ul class="navbar-nav">
                <li class="nav-item">
                    <a class="nav-link" data-widget="pushmenu" href="#" role="button">
                        <i class="fas fa-bars"></i>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
            
            <ul class="navbar-nav ml-auto">
                <li class="nav-item">
                    <a class="nav-link" href="{{ path('app_logout') }}">
                        <i class="fas fa-sign-out-alt"></i> Déconnexion
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </nav>

        {# Sidebar #}
        <aside class="main-sidebar sidebar-dark-primary elevation-4">
            <a href="{{ path('admin_dashboard') }}" class="brand-link">
                <span class="brand-text font-weight-light">Admin Panel</span>
            </a>

            <div class="sidebar">
                <nav class="mt-2">
                    <ul class="nav nav-pills nav-sidebar flex-column" data-widget="treeview">

// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

```
# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)
- Custom controllers for each entity
- Form types for data handling
- Custom security system (no FOSUserBundle)
- RESTful API endpoints (optional for AJAX)
- Service layer for business logic

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

```
# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)
- Custom controllers for each entity
- Form types for data handling
- Custom security system (no FOSUserBundle)
- RESTful API endpoints (optional for AJAX)
- Service layer for business logic

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">

```
# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)
- Custom controllers for each entity
- Form types for data handling
- Custom security system (no FOSUserBundle)
- RESTful API endpoints (optional for AJAX)
- Service layer for business logic

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/admin-lte@3.2/dist/css/adminlte.min.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/css/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.css">
    
    {% block stylesheets %}{% endblock %}
</head>
<body class="hold-transition sidebar-mini layout-fixed">
    <div class="wrapper">
        
        {# Navbar #}
        <nav class="main-header navbar navbar-expand navbar-white navbar-light">
            <ul class="navbar-nav">
                <li class="nav-item">
                    <a class="nav-link" data-widget="pushmenu" href="#" role="button">
                        <i class="fas fa-bars"></i>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
            
            <ul class="navbar-nav ml-auto">

```
# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)
- Custom controllers for each entity
- Form types for data handling
- Custom security system (no FOSUserBundle)
- RESTful API endpoints (optional for AJAX)
- Service layer for business logic

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

### 4. **Template Structure**

````twig
{# filepath: templates/admin/layout.html.twig #}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>{% block title %}Admin Dashboard{% endblock %}</title>
    
    {# AdminLTE 3 CSS #}
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/admin-lte@3.2/dist/css/adminlte.min.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/css/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.css">
    
    {% block stylesheets %}{% endblock %}
</head>
<body class="hold-transition sidebar-mini layout-fixed">
    <div class="wrapper">
        
        {# Navbar #}
        <nav class="main-header navbar navbar-expand navbar-white navbar-light">
            <ul class="navbar-nav">
                <li class="nav-item">
                    <a class="nav-link" data-widget="pushmenu" href="#" role="button">
                        <i class="fas fa-bars"></i>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
            
            <ul class="navbar-nav ml-auto">
                <li class="nav-item">
                    <a class="nav-link" href="{{ path('app_logout') }}">
                        <i class="fas fa-sign-out-alt"></i> Déconnexion
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </nav>

        {# Sidebar #}
        <aside class="main-sidebar sidebar-dark-primary elevation-4">
            <a href="{{ path('admin_dashboard') }}" class="brand-link">
                <span class="brand-text font-weight-light">Admin Panel</span>
            </a>

            <div class="sidebar">
                <nav class="mt-2">
                    <ul class="nav nav-pills nav-sidebar flex-column" data-widget="treeview">
                        <li class="nav-item">
                            <a href="{{ path('admin_dashboard') }}" class="nav-link">
                                <i class="nav-icon fas fa-tachometer-alt"></i>
                                <p>Dashboard</p>
                            </a>
                        
```

// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}

        ]);

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

### 4. **Template Structure**

````twig
{# filepath: templates/admin/layout.html.twig #}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">

    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>{% block title %}Admin Dashboard{% endblock %}</title>
    
    {# AdminLTE 3 CSS #}
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/admin-lte@3.2/dist/css/adminlte.min.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/css/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.css">
    
    {% block stylesheets %}{% endblock %}
</head>
<body class="hold-transition sidebar-mini layout-fixed">
    <div class="wrapper">
        
        {# Navbar #}
        <nav class="main-header navbar navbar-expand navbar-white navbar-light">
            <ul class="navbar-nav">
                <li class="nav-item">
                    <a class="nav-link" data-widget="pushmenu" href="#" role="button">
                        <i class="fas fa-bars"></i>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
            
            <ul class="navbar-nav ml-auto">
                <li class="nav-item">
                    <a class="nav-link" href="{{ path('app_logout') }}">
                        <i class="fas fa-sign-out-alt"></i> Déconnexion
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </nav>

        {# Sidebar #}
        <aside class="main-sidebar sidebar-dark-primary elevation-4">
            <a href="{{ path('admin_dashboard') }}" class="brand-link">
                <span class="brand-text font-weight-light">Admin Panel</span>
            </a>

            <div class="sidebar">
                <nav class="mt-2">
                    <ul class="nav nav-pills nav-sidebar flex-column" data-widget="treeview">
                        <li class="nav-item">
                            <a href="{{ path('admin_dashboard') }}" class="nav-link">
                                <i class="nav-icon fas fa-tachometer-alt"></i>
                                <p>Dashboard</p>
                            </a>
                        
```

```
# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)
- Custom controllers for each entity
- Form types for data handling
- Custom security system (no FOSUserBundle)
- RESTful API endpoints (optional for AJAX)
- Service layer for business logic

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;

            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    {

        $form->handleRequest($request);

            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');

            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);

        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

### 4. **Template Structure**

```
# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)
- Custom controllers for each entity
- Form types for data handling
- Custom security system (no FOSUserBundle)
- RESTful API endpoints (optional for AJAX)
- Service layer for business logic

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

```
# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)
- Custom controllers for each entity
- Form types for data handling
- Custom security system (no FOSUserBundle)
- RESTful API endpoints (optional for AJAX)
- Service layer for business logic

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">

```
# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)
- Custom controllers for each entity
- Form types for data handling
- Custom security system (no FOSUserBundle)
- RESTful API endpoints (optional for AJAX)
- Service layer for business logic

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

### 4. **Template Structure**

    {% block stylesheets %}{% endblock %}

    <div class="wrapper">
        
        {# Navbar #}
        <nav class="main-header navbar navbar-expand navbar-white navbar-light">
            <ul class="navbar-nav">
                <li class="nav-item">
                    <a class="nav-link" data-widget="pushmenu" href="#" role="button">
                        <i class="fas fa-bars"></i>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>

                </li>

```
# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)
- Custom controllers for each entity
- Form types for data handling
- Custom security system (no FOSUserBundle)
- RESTful API endpoints (optional for AJAX)
- Service layer for business logic

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

    <div class="wrapper">
        
        {# Navbar #}

            <ul class="navbar-nav">
                <li class="nav-item">
                    <a class="nav-link" data-widget="pushmenu" href="#" role="button">
                        <i class="fas fa-bars"></i>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
            
            <ul class="navbar-nav ml-auto">
                <li class="nav-item">

        ]);

```
# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)
- Custom controllers for each entity
- Form types for data handling
- Custom security system (no FOSUserBundle)
- RESTful API endpoints (optional for AJAX)
- Service layer for business logic

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

### 4. **Template Structure**

````twig
{# filepath: templates/admin/layout.html.twig #}
