# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)
- Custom controllers for each entity
- Form types for data handling
- Custom security system (no FOSUserBundle)
- RESTful API endpoints (optional for AJAX)
- Service layer for business logic

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

                                </button>
                            </div>
                        {% endfor %}

# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)
- Custom controllers for each entity
- Form types for data handling
- Custom security system (no FOSUserBundle)
- RESTful API endpoints (optional for AJAX)
- Service layer for business logic

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

````twig
{# filepath: templates/admin/cours/index.html.twig #}
{% extends 'admin/layout.html.twig' %}

{% block title %}Gestion des Cours{% endblock %}

{% block body %}
<div class="row">
    <div class="col-12">
        <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h3 class="card-title">Liste des Cours</h3>
                <div class="card-tools">
                    <a href="{{ path('admin_cours_create') }}" class="btn btn-success btn-sm">
                        <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Nouveau Cours
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body">
                <table id="coursTable" class="table table-bordered table-striped">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>ID</th>
                            <th>Titre</th>
                            <th>Description</th>
                            <th>Durée</th>
                            <th>Actions</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        {% for cours in cours_list %}
                        <tr>
                            <td>{{ cours.id }}</td>
                            <td>{{ cours.titre }}</td>
                            <td>{{ cours.description|slice(0, 100) }}...</td>
                            <td>{{ cours.duree }} heures</td>
                            <td>
                                <a href="{{ path('admin_cours_edit', {id: cours.id}) }}" 
                                   class="btn btn-info btn-sm">
                                    <i class="fas fa-edit"></i>
                                </a>
                                <form method="post" 
                                      action="{{ path('admin_cours_delete', {id: cours.id}) }}" 
                                      style="display:inline"
                                      onsubmit="return confirm('Êtes-vous sûr?');">
                                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm">
                                        <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                                    </button>
                                </form>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                        {% endfor %}
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block javascripts %}
<script>
    $(document).ready(function() {
        $('#coursTable').DataTable({
            "language": {
                "url": "//cdn.datatables.net/plug-ins/1.13.6/i18n/fr-FR.json"
            },
            "responsive": true,
            "autoWidth": false
        });
    });
</script>
{% endblock %}

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;

    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}

            <section class="content">
                <div class="container-fluid">
                    {% block body %}{% endblock %}
                </div>
            </section>
        </div>

        <footer class="main-footer">
            <strong>&copy; 2026 Gestion Cours</strong> - Tous droits réservés
        </footer>
    </div>

    {# Scripts #}
    <script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.7.0.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@4.6.2/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/admin-lte@3.2/dist/js/adminlte.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/js/jquery.dataTables.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/js/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.js"></script>
    
    {% block javascripts %}{% endblock %}
</body>
</html>
````

````twig

{% extends 'admin/layout.html.twig' %}

{% block title %}Gestion des Cours{% endblock %}

{% block body %}
<div class="row">
    <div class="col-12">
        <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
                <h3 class="card-title">Liste des Cours</h3>
                <div class="card-tools">
                    <a href="{{ path('admin_cours_create') }}" class="btn btn-success btn-sm">
                        <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Nouveau Cours
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body">
                <table id="coursTable" class="table table-bordered table-striped">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>ID</th>
                            <th>Titre</th>
                            <th>Description</th>
                            <th>Durée</th>
                            <th>Actions</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        {% for cours in cours_list %}
                        <tr>
                            <td>{{ cours.id }}</td>
                            <td>{{ cours.titre }}</td>
                            <td>{{ cours.description|slice(0, 100) }}...</td>
                            <td>{{ cours.duree }} heures</td>
                            <td>
                                <a href="{{ path('admin_cours_edit', {id: cours.id}) }}" 
                                   class="btn btn-info btn-sm">
                                    <i class="fas fa-edit"></i>
                                </a>
                                <form method="post" 
                                      action="{{ path('admin_cours_delete', {id: cours.id}) }}" 
                                      style="display:inline"
                                      onsubmit="return confirm('Êtes-vous sûr?');">
                                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm">
                                        <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                                    </button>
                                </form>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                        {% endfor %}
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

## License: GPL-3.0

# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)
- Custom controllers for each entity
- Form types for data handling
- Custom security system (no FOSUserBundle)
- RESTful API endpoints (optional for AJAX)
- Service layer for business logic

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

### 4. **Template Structure**

````twig
{# filepath: templates/admin/layout.html.twig #}
<!DOCTYPE html>

    {# AdminLTE 3 CSS #}
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/admin-lte@3.2/dist/css/adminlte.min.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/css/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.css">
    
    {% block stylesheets %}{% endblock %}
</head>
<body class="hold-transition sidebar-mini layout-fixed">
    <div class="wrapper">
        
        {# Navbar #}
        <nav class="main-header navbar navbar-expand navbar-white navbar-light">
            <ul class="navbar-nav">
                <li class="nav-item">
                    <a class="nav-link" data-widget="pushmenu" href="#" role="button">
                        <i class="fas fa-bars"></i>
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>

                <li class="nav-item">

                        <i class="fas fa-sign-out-alt"></i> Déconnexion
                    </a>
                </li>
            </ul>
        </nav>

        {# Sidebar #}

            <a href="{{ path('admin_dashboard') }}" class="brand-link">
                <span class="brand-text font-weight-light">Admin Panel</span>
            </a>

            <div class="sidebar">
                <nav class="mt-2">
                    <ul class="nav nav-pills nav-sidebar flex-column" data-widget="treeview">

                                <i class="nav-icon fas fa-tachometer-alt"></i>
                                <p>Dashboard</p>
                            </a>
                        </li>

                            <a href="{{ path('admin_cours_index') }}" class="nav-link">
                                <i class="nav-icon fas fa-book"></i>
                                <p>Cours</p>
                            </a>
                        </li>
                        {# Add more menu items #}
                    </ul>
                </nav>
            </div>
        </aside>

        {# Content #}
        <div class="content-wrapper">
            <div class="content-header">
                <div class="container-fluid">
                    {% for label, messages in app.flashes %}
                        {% for message in messages %}
                            <div class="alert alert-{{ label }} alert-dismissible fade show">
                                {{ message }}
                                <button type="button" class="close" data-dismiss="alert">
                                    <span>&times;</span>
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        {% endfor %}
                    {% endfor %}
                </div>
            </div>

            <section class="content">
                <div class="container-fluid">
                    {% block body %}{% endblock %}
                </div>
            </section>
        </div>

        <footer class="main-footer">
            <strong>&copy; 2026 Gestion Cours</strong> - Tous droits réservés
        </footer>
    </div>

    {# Scripts #}
    <script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.7.0.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@4.6.2/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/admin-lte@3.2/dist/js/adminlte.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/js/jquery.dataTables.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/js/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.js"></script>
    
    {% block javascripts %}{% endblock %}
</body>
</html>

// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}

# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/css/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.css">
    
    {% block stylesheets %}{% endblock %}
</head>
<body class="hold-transition sidebar-mini layout-fixed">
    <div class="wrapper">
        
        {# Navbar #}

                    </a>

                            </a>
                        </li>
                        {# Add more menu items #}
                    </ul>
                </nav>
            </div>
        </aside>

        {# Content #}
        <div class="content-wrapper">
            <div class="content-header">
                <div class="container-fluid">
                    {% for label, messages in app.flashes %}
                        {% for message in messages %}
                            <div class="alert alert-{{ label }} alert-dismissible fade show">
                                {{ message }}
                                <button type="button" class="close" data-dismiss="alert">
                                    <span>&times;</span>
                                </button>
                            </div>
                        {% endfor %}
                    {% endfor %}
                </div>
            </div>

            <section class="content">
                <div class="container-fluid">
                    {% block body %}{% endblock %}
                </div>
            </section>
        </div>

            <strong>&copy; 2026 Gestion Cours</strong> - Tous droits réservés
        </footer>
    </div>

    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@4.6.2/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/admin-lte@3.2/dist/js/adminlte.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/js/jquery.dataTables.min.js"></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.6/js/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.js"></script>
    
    {% block javascripts %}{% endblock %}
</body>
</html>

<div class="row">
    <div class="col-12">
        <div class="card">

                <h3 class="card-title">Liste des Cours</h3>
                <div class="card-tools">
                    <a href="{{ path('admin_cours_create') }}" class="btn btn-success btn-sm">
                        <i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Nouveau Cours
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body">
                <table id="coursTable" class="table table-bordered table-striped">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>ID</th>
                            <th>Titre</th>
                            <th>Description</th>
                            <th>Durée</th>
                            <th>Actions</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                        {% for cours in cours_list %}
                        <tr>
                            <td>{{ cours.id }}</td>
                            <td>{{ cours.titre }}</td>
                            <td>{{ cours.description|slice(0, 100) }}...</td>
                            <td>{{ cours.duree }} heures</td>
                            <td>
                                <a href="{{ path('admin_cours_edit', {id: cours.id}) }}" 
                                   class="btn btn-info btn-sm">
                                    <i class="fas fa-edit"></i>
                                </a>
                                <form method="post" 
                                      action="{{ path('admin_cours_delete', {id: cours.id}) }}" 
                                      style="display:inline"
                                      onsubmit="return confirm('Êtes-vous sûr?');">
                                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-danger btn-sm">
                                        <i class="fas fa-trash"></i>
                                    </button>
                                </form>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                        {% endfor %}
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
{% endblock %}

{% block javascripts %}
<script>
    $(document).ready(function() {
        $('#coursTable').DataTable({
            "language": {
                "url": "//cdn.datatables.net/plug-ins/1.13.6/i18n/fr-FR.json"
            },
            "responsive": true,
            "autoWidth": false
        });
    });
</script>
{% endblock %}

# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)
- Custom controllers for each entity
- Form types for data handling
- Custom security system (no FOSUserBundle)
- RESTful API endpoints (optional for AJAX)
- Service layer for business logic

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````

<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}

                </nav>
            </div>
        </aside>

        {# Content #}
        <div class="content-wrapper">

                <div class="container-fluid">
                    {% for label, messages in app.flashes %}
                        {% for message in messages %}

                                </button>
                            </div>
                        {% endfor %}
                    {% endfor %}

                </div>
            </section>
        </div>

        </footer>

## License: MIT

```
# High-Level Plan for Custom Admin Template & CRUD Operations

I'll help you build a professional, custom admin dashboard with excellent UI/UX instead of using EasyAdmin Bundle.

## 🎯 Architecture Overview

### 1. **Backend Structure** (Symfony)
- Custom controllers for each entity
- Form types for data handling
- Custom security system (no FOSUserBundle)
- RESTful API endpoints (optional for AJAX)
- Service layer for business logic

### 2. **Frontend Structure** (Modern UI/UX)

#### Recommended Tech Stack:
- **Admin Template**: AdminLTE 3, Tabler, or CoreUI (Bootstrap 5 based)
- **Icons**: Font Awesome 6 or Bootstrap Icons
- **DataTables**: For listing pages with search, sort, pagination
- **Charts**: Chart.js or ApexCharts
- **Form Validation**: Client-side + Server-side
- **AJAX**: For smooth UX without page reloads

### 3. **Project Structure**

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/BaseAdminController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use Symfony\Bundle\FrameworkBundle\Controller\AbstractController;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

abstract class BaseAdminController extends AbstractController
{
    protected function renderAdmin(string $view, array $parameters = []): Response
    {
        return $this->render('admin/' . $view, array_merge([
            'admin_layout' => true,
        ], $parameters));
    }
}
````

````php
// filepath: src/Controller/Admin/CoursController.php
<?php

namespace App\Controller\Admin;

use App\Entity\Cours;
use App\Form\CoursType;
use App\Repository\CoursRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManagerInterface;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request;
use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
use Symfony\Component\Routing\Annotation\Route;

#[Route('/admin/cours')]
class CoursController extends BaseAdminController
{
    #[Route('/', name: 'admin_cours_index')]
    public function index(CoursRepository $repository): Response
    {
        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/index.html.twig', [
            'cours_list' => $repository->findAll(),
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/create', name: 'admin_cours_create')]
    public function create(Request $request, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $cours = new Cours();
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->persist($cours);
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours créé avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'create',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/edit', name: 'admin_cours_edit')]
    public function edit(Request $request, Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $form = $this->createForm(CoursType::class, $cours);
        $form->handleRequest($request);

        if ($form->isSubmitted() && $form->isValid()) {
            $em->flush();

            $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours modifié avec succès!');
            return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
        }

        return $this->renderAdmin('cours/form.html.twig', [
            'form' => $form->createView(),
            'cours' => $cours,
            'action' => 'edit',
        ]);
    }

    #[Route('/{id}/delete', name: 'admin_cours_delete', methods: ['POST'])]
    public function delete(Cours $cours, EntityManagerInterface $em): Response
    {
        $em->remove($cours);
        $em->flush();

        $this->addFlash('success', 'Cours supprimé avec succès!');
        return $this->redirectToRoute('admin_cours_index');
    }
}
````
